title: 4 x Classic Mahogany Varnish 180ml Paint Gloss Car Home Metal Wood Brick
description: Directions All surfaces should be clean and dry and free of dust, rust, oil and old loose paint. Where loose material is present, sand down with special sanding block or paper. Metal surfaces should be scraped, sanded and primed with an anti-corrosive paint. Using a clean soft brush simply apply a single coat to the surface to be painted. Allow 8-10 hours for surface drying and 24 hours in normal conditions for the paint to hard dry. If applying a second coat wait 24 hours.
